creator: jpaetzel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you provide me with your config file so I can test it here?

Also, if you'd be willing to try 3.1.2p1, I just submitted the patches  
for that.

http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/136890

If you can test that, knowing whether it solves the issue or not  
provides a useful data point.

Thanks,

Josh Paetzel
